allowAsRecordingRulesTarget.description: Allow this data source to be used as the target for Grafana-managed recording rules.

cacheLevel.description: Sets the browser caching level for editor queries. Higher cache settings are recommended for high cardinality data sources.

customQueryParameters.description: Add custom parameters to the Prometheus query URL. Examples: timeout, partial_response, dedup, max_source_resolution. Multiple parameters should be joined using &.

defaultEditor.description: Sets the default editor mode for new queries in the query editor.

disableMetricsLookup.description: When enabled, the metrics chooser in the query editor is not populated. Useful for Prometheus instances with a large number of metrics.

disableRecordingRules.description: When enabled, Grafana won't fetch and parse recording rules from Prometheus, improving dashboard performance.

exemplarTraceIdDestinations.description: Configure exemplar trace ID destinations. Links traces from Prometheus exemplars to a tracing backend.

datasourceUid.description: Data source UID for internal link to a tracing backend.

name.description: The name of the field in the labels object used to obtain the traceID.

url.description: External link URL. Interpolate the value using ${__value.raw}.

urlDisplayLabel.description: Custom display label to override the value of the Label name field.

httpMethod.description: HTTP method used for querying Prometheus. POST is recommended for complex queries.

incrementalQueryOverlapWindow.description: Buffer of time added to incremental queries. Default is 10m.

incrementalQuerying.description: Enable incremental querying to cache results and only fetch new data since the last query. Reduces database and network load.

oauthPassThru.description: Forward the OAuth access token (and if available: the OIDC ID token) of the user querying the data source.

prometheusType.description: Select the type of your Prometheus-compatible database. Different types support different APIs. Setting this incorrectly may cause unexpected behavior.

prometheusVersion.description: The version of your Prometheus instance (e.g. 2.37.0, 3.3.0).

queryTimeout.description: Sets the Prometheus query timeout. Default is 60s. Without a timeout, complex queries can run indefinitely.

seriesEndpoint.description: Use the /api/v1/series endpoint with match[] parameter instead of the label values endpoint. The series endpoint supports POST method.

seriesLimit.description: Maximum number of series returned. Applies to all resources (metrics, labels, values) for both series and labels endpoints. Set to 0 to disable the limit. Default is 40000.

timeInterval.description: Sets the standard scrape and evaluation interval. Set it to match the typical scrape interval in your Prometheus configuration. Default is 15s.

secureValues.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate to verify the Prometheus server's TLS certificate.
PEM-encoded client certificate for TLS client authentication.
PEM-encoded client private key for TLS client authentication.
